case_title: LARSON, ERIC vs. KNOX, GELIPPE et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LARSON, ERIC AS TO DEFENDANT KNOX, GELIPPE DOES 1-25 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-21-1999 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-22-1999 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAY-03-1999
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR APR-27-1999 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 212
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE EA PARTY TO PAY ITS OWN COSTS.

PROOF OF SERVICE OSC CALENDAR OF APR-27-1999, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT HEARING ON APR-27-1999, SANCTION TO PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL NEAL A. KUVARA, WHO IS REQUIRED TO ATTEND OSC HEARING., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-12-1999 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SANCTIONS IMPOSED ON 4-28-99 ARE VACATED. DISMISSAL AS TO ENTIRE ACTION FILED ON 4-26-99.
